title: CBIC Streamlines Customs Queries for FTP Clarifications
content:
# CBIC Streamlines Customs Queries for FTP Clarifications

Ek important update hai! Central Board of Indirect Taxes & Customs (CBIC) ne Foreign Trade Policy (FTP) clarifications se judi Customs queries ko standardize karne ke liye naye guidelines announce kiye hain. Yeh move transparency badhane, delays kam karne, aur trading community ke liye ease of doing business improve karne ke liye hai.

**Key Highlights of Instruction No. 07/2026-Customs dated June 02, 2026:**

*   **No Direct Correspondence with DGFT:** Ab Customs field formations Directorate General of Foreign Trade (DGFT) Headquarters ya Regional Authorities se directly FTP provisions ke interpretation ya policy conditions ke liye clarification nahi maang sakti hain.
*   **Streamlined Escalation Protocol:** Interpretational issues ko pehle Commissionerate ya Zonal level par examine kiya jayega. Policy-level clarifications required hone par hi, thorough examination ke baad, Principal Chief Commissioner/Chief Commissioner concerned Zone se CBIC Board ko refer kiya jayega.
*   **Commodity-Specific Issues:** Agar koi commodity-specific issue hai jisme FTP provisions ya policy conditions ki clarification chahiye, toh usse National Assessment Centre (NAC) ki examination aur approval ke baad hi Board ko refer kiya jayega.
*   **Avoiding Delays:** Is instruction mein yeh bhi emphasize kiya gaya hai ki consignments ko sirf interpretational issues ki wajah se pending na rakha jaaye. Jahan legal ho, provisional assessment ya anya facilitative mechanisms use kiye ja sakte hain taaki importers/exporters ko inconvenience na ho aur legitimate trade mein disruption na aaye.
*   **Rationale:** Pehle, direct references se inconsistent practices, assessment aur clearance mein delays hote the, jisse trade ko pareshani hoti thi. Naye mechanism ka aim institutional consistency aur FTP provisions ka uniform implementation ensure karna hai.

Yeh kadam Customs procedures ko aur efficient banane ki disha mein ek mahatvapurna step hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic.gov.in/)

*Published on: 5 June 2026*
